title: গোরা
author: রবীন্দ্রনাথ ঠাকুর
description: A powerful novel exploring identity, religion, and nationalism in colonial Bengal.

title: আনন্দমঠ
author: বঙ্কিমচন্দ্র চট্টোপাধ্যায়
description: A historical novel set during the Sannyasi Rebellion, inspiring generations with patriotic fervour.

title: পথের পাঁচালী
author: বিভূতিভূষণ বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়
description: A timeless coming-of-age story set in rural Bengal, rich with human emotion and nature.

title: একাত্তরের দিনগুলি
author: জাহানারা ইমাম
description: A poignant diary recounting the Liberation War of Bangladesh in 1971 through a mother's eyes.

title: হযবরল
author: সুকুমার রায়
description: A whimsical adventure story in the vein of Alice in Wonderland, full of absurd characters and comic chaos.

title: বাংলাদেশের ইতিহাস
author: সুনীতিভূষণ কানুনগো
description: A comprehensive scholarly account of the history of Bangladesh from ancient times to independence.

title: Guns, Germs, and Steel
author: Jared Diamond
description: An investigation into why certain civilisations came to dominate the world using geography, biology, and history.

title: ফেলুদা সমগ্র
author: সত্যজিৎ রায়
description: The complete collection of detective adventures featuring the brilliant sleuth Feluda across Bengal.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: A revolutionary look at evolution from the gene's point of view, introducing the concept of the meme to the world.

title: গল্পমালা
author: রবীন্দ্রনাথ ঠাকুর
description: A collection of short stories and tales by Rabindranath Tagore adapted and simplified for young readers.

title: আমার দেখা রাজনীতির পঞ্চাশ বছর
author: আবুল মনসুর আহমদ
description: A memoir spanning fifty years of political history in Bengal and Bangladesh by an eyewitness journalist.

title: আবোল তাবোল
author: সুকুমার রায়
description: A legendary collection of nonsense rhymes and absurdist poems beloved by children for over a century.
